description: Status Portal — provides real-time transaction status to authorized parties, enforces access control, masks PII in status views, and notifies parties of condition changes, stage advances, and approaching deadlines.

hard_stops.label: Unauthorized Party Access Block
hard_stops.logic: A party not authorized on the escrow is attempting to access transaction status — block access.

hard_stops.label: PII Exposure In Status Mask
hard_stops.logic: Status view contains unmasked PII (SSN, account numbers, etc.) — mask before rendering.

soft_flags.label: Condition Change
soft_flags.logic: A condition status has changed — notify relevant parties.

soft_flags.label: Stage Advance
soft_flags.logic: Escrow has advanced to a new stage — notify all parties.

soft_flags.label: Deadline Approaching
soft_flags.logic: A transaction deadline is approaching — notify responsible parties.
